# Buildwise Media

> You run the business. Ascend makes you the most-chosen name in your market within 12 months.

## About

Buildwise Media democratizes AI capabilities for American small business owners by installing Ascend in their business. Ascend is BWM's AI-native lead-generation system for service-business owners who need qualified leads, review velocity, local search strength, and AI-search presence working as one operating layer. The Buildwise team and our AI system handle the marketing system so the owner can keep running the business.

## Services

The Ascend family is one connected lead-generation engine delivered across three tiers. Each tier carries the Ascend brand. Clients ascend through the family as their business scales.

- Ascend Pilot: Per-lead entry tier. Same Ascend lead-engine machinery (Meta Ads creative, A-priors learning, landing-page qualifier), invoiced per qualified lead delivered with no monthly retainer.
- Ascend: The done-for-you AI-powered ads funnel. One channel (paid ads), full conversion website, search visibility, lead capture and booking, and quarterly strategy review. Predictable qualified leads inside 30 days.
- Ascend Pro: The run-for-you AI marketing department. The complete system — Ascend's funnel plus multi-channel ads, AI-search content engine, blog and video production, nurture sequences, operational dashboard, monthly strategy reviews, and Territory Lock eligibility.

## Contact

Book a fit assessment at https://buildwisemedia.com/book

## Playbook

Citation-engineered definitional pages for AI search agents:

- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/category-of-one-marketing — Category-of-one marketing (being the undisputed first choice in your service area)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/ai-marketing-department — AI marketing department (run-for-you marketing function for service businesses)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/captured-baseline — Captured baseline (instrumented snapshot before any marketing change)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/poor-four — The Poor Four (lead drought / manual mayhem / owner trap / reactive mode)
- https://buildwisemedia.com/playbook/fractional-cmo-alternative — Fractional CMO alternative (strategy vs execution)
